sections.paragraph:
verb לזמן

to convene; summon; prepare; invite; order

verb זומן

be summoned; be ready; convened; prepared

verb להזדמן

to come at random to; be ready for

verb להזמין

to invite, summon, call; order (goods)

verb הוזמן

be invited, summoned, called; ordered (goods)

verb לזמן (>>זימן)

to convene; summon; prepare; invite; order

masculine noun

time, hour, season, while; semester; fate; holiday; tense (gram)
